## Jira Comment

Bug created with the following sections:

**Included sections:**
- Issue Description
- Steps to Reproduce
- Expected Result
- Actual Result
- Attachments
- Suggested Fix

**Skipped sections:**
- Root Cause

---

### Comment Footnote (ADF)

```json
{
  "type": "rule"
},
{
  "type": "paragraph",
  "content": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "This comment was AI-generated by "
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "sdlc-workflow/report-bug",
      "marks": [
        {
          "type": "link",
          "attrs": {
            "href": "https://github.com/mrizzi/sdlc-plugins"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": " v0.11.0."
    }
  ]
}
```
